current_model_improvements.change: It now evaluates q+p(Lin-H)+dLout, selects the least-capable feasible GPU, falls back to the most capable GPU, tracks assignment capacity, and implements feedback.
current_model_improvements.gap: The prior kernel optimized unrelated quality-gap and cost fields.
current_model_improvements.why_expressible_now: Requests and sparse edges carry fixed predictor outputs and concrete heterogeneous targets; state/feedback can retain monitor results; rebalance stages corrective intent.

current_model_improvements.change: It now generates deadline, queue, cache, prefill/decode, capability, and output-length facts and reports an E2E-SLO proxy.
current_model_improvements.gap: The benchmark used quality-adjusted cost.

implementation_gaps.fix: On RouteCause::Rebalance, include current target/capability and remaining deadline, then restrict candidates to stronger GPUs and apply just-enough selection to refreshed predictions.

implementation_gaps.fix: Have the host trigger periodic feedback/rebalance opportunities and update per-target q/p/d and per-request output predictions in state.

implementation_gaps.fix: Define lower rank as less capable, reject inconsistent ranks, and add feasible/no-feasible boundary tests.
implementation_gaps.gap: capability_rank ordering is implicit and lacks schema validation.

implementation_gaps.fix: Apply common demand accounting in addition to max_assignments.

implementation_gaps.fix: Distinguish first-prefill from first-decode using a trusted phase fact/cause; after prefill completion select and bind a decoder.
implementation_gaps.gap: Generation 0 is always routed to the prefiller, so first-turn decode is never assigned to the decoder with lowest active KV occupancy.

implementation_gaps.fix: Write the chosen decoder to request or group scratch and define fallback/rebinding on TargetChanged.
implementation_gaps.gap: bound_target_id is supplied externally rather than persisted by the policy, so restart, missing-target, and stale-binding behavior is unproven.

Persist decoder binding and test TargetChanged recovery.
Add first-prefill/first-decode/multi-generation traces.
Declare transfer deferred.
Introduce phase-handoff lifecycle before claiming exactly-once movement.
